title: SPIRE SVID
description: Schema representing SPIFFE Verifiable Identity Documents (SVIDs) issued by SPIRE, including X.509-SVIDs and JWT-SVIDs. SVIDs are the primary credential format used by SPIRE to assert workload identities as SPIFFE IDs.

type.description: The SVID type, either x509 for an X.509-SVID carrying a certificate chain or jwt for a JWT-SVID carrying a signed JSON Web Token.

spiffe_id.description: The SPIFFE ID encoded in this SVID, identifying the workload within a trust domain. Must conform to the spiffe:// URI scheme and include the trust domain and a workload path.

hint.description: Optional hint string provided by SPIRE to help workloads distinguish between multiple SVIDs with different SPIFFE IDs when multiple registration entries match.

X509SVID.description: An X.509-SVID consisting of a certificate chain and corresponding private key material. The leaf certificate encodes the SPIFFE ID in the Subject Alternative Name URI field.

cert_chain.description: Ordered list of DER-encoded X.509 certificates forming the SVID chain, beginning with the leaf certificate that encodes the SPIFFE ID and ending with the last intermediate before the trust bundle root.

private_key.description: DER-encoded private key corresponding to the public key in the leaf certificate. Present only when the Workload API delivers key material to the workload.

expiry_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when this X.509-SVID expires. Workloads should refresh their SVID before this time.

JWTSVID.description: A JWT-SVID consisting of a signed JSON Web Token carrying the SPIFFE ID as the subject claim. Used for authentication to systems supporting OIDC token validation.

token.description: The compact serialized JWT string in the format header.payload.signature.

expiry_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when this JWT-SVID expires. Corresponds to the exp claim in the JWT payload.

issued_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when this JWT-SVID was issued. Corresponds to the iat claim in the JWT payload.

RegistrationEntry.description: A SPIRE registration entry that defines the SPIFFE ID to be issued to workloads matching a specific set of selectors. Entries are managed by administrators via the SPIRE Server API.

id.description: Globally unique identifier for this registration entry, assigned by SPIRE Server on creation.

selectors.description: List of selectors that must all match on an attested node or workload for this entry to apply. Selectors are type:value pairs such as unix:uid:1000 or k8s:pod-label:app:frontend.

ttl.description: Time-to-live in seconds for SVIDs issued using this entry. Overrides the server default TTL when set.

dns_names.description: Optional list of DNS SANs to include in X.509-SVIDs issued for this entry, in addition to the SPIFFE ID URI SAN.

downstream.description: When true, indicates this entry represents a downstream SPIRE Server that will receive trust bundle updates via the bundle endpoint.

expires_at.description: Optional Unix timestamp after which this registration entry is no longer valid. SVIDs will not be issued for expired entries.

federation_with.description: List of trust domain names that workloads matching this entry should federate with, receiving foreign trust bundle material.

admin.description: When true, workloads matching this entry can perform administrative operations on the SPIRE Server API.

store_svid.description: When true, the SVID issued for this entry is stored in the agent's SVID store plugin rather than being returned via the Workload API.

hint.description: Optional hint to identify this entry's SVID when a workload receives multiple SVIDs.

created_at.description: Unix timestamp indicating when this registration entry was created.

revision_number.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entry, incremented on each update.

SPIFFEID.description: A parsed SPIFFE ID consisting of a trust domain and a path component.

trust_domain.description: The trust domain portion of the SPIFFE ID, e.g., example.org.

path.description: The path portion of the SPIFFE ID following the trust domain, e.g., /workload/frontend.

Selector.description: A selector is a type:value pair used during workload or node attestation to match registration entries. Examples include unix:uid:1000, k8s:ns:default, and aws:instance-profile:arn:aws:iam::123:instance-profile/spire.

type.description: The attestor or selector plugin type, such as unix, k8s, aws, gcp, azure, docker, or x509pop.

value.description: The selector value specific to the type, such as ns:default for k8s or uid:1000 for unix.

Bundle.description: A SPIFFE trust bundle containing the root CA certificates and JWT signing keys for a trust domain. Bundles are used to verify SVIDs presented by workloads in that trust domain.

trust_domain.description: The trust domain this bundle belongs to.

x509_authorities.description: List of DER-encoded X.509 root CA certificates that form the X.509 trust anchor for this trust domain.

tainted.description: When true, this authority has been marked as tainted and SVIDs signed by it are no longer trusted.

jwt_authorities.description: List of JWT signing public keys that can be used to verify JWT-SVIDs issued for this trust domain.

public_key.description: DER-encoded public key material for JWT verification.

key_id.description: Key identifier (kid) matching the kid header of JWT-SVIDs signed with this key.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when this JWT authority expires.

tainted.description: When true, this JWT authority has been marked as tainted.

refresh_hint.description: Suggested number of seconds after which consumers should re-fetch this bundle to check for updates.

sequence_number.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number for this bundle, incremented on each update.

Agent.description: Represents an attested SPIRE Agent node known to the SPIRE Server. Agents are authenticated via node attestation and receive their own X.509-SVID from the server.

attestation_type.description: The node attestor plugin type used to attest this agent, such as k8s_sat, aws_iid, gcp_iit, azure_msi, or join_token.

x509svid_expires_at.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the agent's current X.509-SVID expires.

x509svid_serial_number.description: Serial number of the agent's current X.509-SVID certificate.

banned.description: When true, this agent has been banned and is no longer permitted to attest or receive SVIDs.

selectors.description: List of selectors produced by the node attestor for this agent, used to match node-scoped registration entries.

can_reattest.description: When true, this agent supports re-attestation using the same attestation method.
